requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Honduras Installation Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线与洪都拉斯安装证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線與宏都拉斯安裝證據

summary.en: For Honduras EV charger projects, an official charger-specific national technical regulation could not be confirmed from CREE / ENEE sources as of 2026-06-14. The conservative export package should therefore use IEC 61851-1 as the conductive EVSE general safety baseline and IEC 61851-23 for DC chargers, then map installation protection, earthing, isolation, emergency stop, overcurrent, residual-current or ground-fault protection, cable temperature rise, enclosure rating, Spanish labels, and commissioning tests to CREE / ENEE and site-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从CREE / ENEE来源确认洪都拉斯针对充电桩的官方专门技术法规。因此，保守的出口资料包应以IEC 61851-1作为传导式EVSE通用安全基线，直流充电桩采用IEC 61851-23，并将安装保护、接地、绝缘、急停、过流、剩余电流或接地故障保护、电缆温升、外壳防护等级、西班牙语标签及调试测试映射到CREE / ENEE和场地方要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從CREE / ENEE來源確認宏都拉斯針對充電樁的官方專門技術法規。因此，保守的出口資料包應以IEC 61851-1作為傳導式EVSE通用安全基線，直流充電樁採用IEC 61851-23，並將安裝保護、接地、絕緣、急停、過流、剩餘電流或接地故障保護、電纜溫升、外殼防護等級、西班牙語標籤及調試測試映射到CREE / ENEE和場地方要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
CREE electricity-sector technical standards and procedures
ENEE or distribution utility installation and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system general requirements, with GB/T 20234 connector requirements and GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T evidence can support an engineering review, but the China-specific connector, 50 Hz supply assumptions, markings, and communication stack do not replace IEC 61851 evidence for a Honduras project.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统通用要求，并配套GB/T 20234接口要求及GB/T 27930直流通信。GB/T证据可支持工程审查，但其中的中国特定接口、50 Hz供电假设、标识及通信栈不能替代洪都拉斯项目所需的IEC 61851证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統通用要求，並配套GB/T 20234接口要求及GB/T 27930直流通訊。GB/T證據可支持工程審查，但其中的中國特定接口、50 Hz供電假設、標識及通訊棧不能替代宏都拉斯項目所需的IEC 61851證據。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, accredited safety and enclosure test reports, Spanish installation and warning labels, earthing and protective-device calculations, 60 Hz fault-current assumptions, and commissioning procedures for the Honduras installer and utility. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough without clause-level mapping and local installation review.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、认可安全及外壳测试报告、西班牙语安装和警示标签、接地和保护器件计算、60 Hz故障电流假设，以及供洪都拉斯安装方和公用事业单位使用的调试程序。单独的GB/T 18487报告若无逐条映射和当地安装审查，并不足够。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、認可安全及外殼測試報告、西班牙語安裝和警示標籤、接地和保護器件計算、60 Hz故障電流假設，以及供宏都拉斯安裝方和公用事業單位使用的調試程序。單獨的GB/T 18487報告若無逐條映射和當地安裝審查，並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Required by project risk control and likely by utility/site acceptance; exact Honduras mandatory EVSE product-standard route not confirmed, so confirm with CREE, ENEE, OHN, importer, and qualified installer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Honduras without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487.1-2023 only as a design starting point. Honduras-facing documentation should include IEC 61851 evidence, Spanish safety information, 60 Hz protection assumptions, and local installer / utility review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向洪都拉斯的文件应包括IEC 61851证据、西班牙语安全信息、60 Hz保护假设，以及当地安装方/公用事业审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向宏都拉斯的文件應包括IEC 61851證據、西班牙語安全資訊、60 Hz保護假設，以及當地安裝方/公用事業審查。
